title: Growth Marketing Manager - Greater China
description:
At Wise, we're on a mission to build the best way to move and manage money internationally. We're making financial services more fair, accessible, and affordable for people and businesses worldwide. As we continue to grow, we're looking for a Growth Marketing Manager with a focus on Mainland China & Hong Kong markets. This role is pivotal in driving our growth strategy, managing multi-channel campaigns, and fostering partnerships to increase our transaction volume in these key markets.

Your Mission

As a Growth Marketing Manager for Greater China, you will:

  • Drive growth initiatives and country level marketing strategies, ensuring market penetration and user acquisition.
  • Organize and execute multi-channel marketing campaigns, coordinating closely with internal teams and external partners to maximize reach and impact.
  • Lead product launches in the region, tailoring strategies to meet local needs and preferences.
  • Collaborate closely with paid channels and media agencies to identify new channels to test and scale successful tactics, optimizing for cost-effective customer acquisition.
  • Collaborate with local partners, including but not limited to expat groups in China, Chinese diaspora communities in popular destination countries, education and immigration agencies to explore innovative avenues for transaction volume growth.
  • Work closely with the Organic Social and Influencer marketing teams to drive a strong online presence on dedicated platforms, and increase our brand presence in the market.
  • Work closely with the analytics team to monitor campaign performance, generate insights, and produce comprehensive reports to guide future strategies.

Qualifications

You'll be a great fit for this role if you have:

  • Experience & Expertise:
    A minimum of 5 years of marketing experience, with at least 2 years specifically focused on the China market or Chinese - speaking audiences
    Proficiency in key Chinese channels, with experience launching and managing campaigns on platforms such as WeChat, RedNote, and Douyin
    Strong preference for experience within the fintech or related industries
    Deep understanding of local nuances, skilled in tailoring strategies for diverse cultural contexts and demonstrating strong localization expertise
  • Core Competencies:
    Data-Driven Approach:     Root your strategies in analytics, leveraging data effectively to inform decisions and drive measurable growth
    Creativity & Innovation: Bring a creative approach to your work, consistently seeking ways to engage audiences and achieve business objectives
    Teamwork & Leadership: A proactive team player with excellent project planning skills, capable of efficiently leading and managing cross-functional initiatives
    Communication: Effective communicator, able to clearly articulate ideas and collaborate efficiently with both internal teams and external stakeholders
  • Language Skills:
    Strong proficiency in Mandarin
    Cantonese proficiency is a plus

Nice to Haves:

  • Experience with Paid Marketing strategies/ campaigns/ channels experience
  • Working experience in fintech/ financial services/ tech/ app-based product companies

What’s in It for You?

  • Opportunity to significantly impact Wise's growth in the Greater China region, contributing to our mission of building money without borders
  • Empowerment in your role, with the support of a talented and passionate team
  • Competitive compensation package, including RSUs
  • Hybrid working model, allowing for a blend of home and office work
  • Generous self-development budget and comprehensive benefits package
  • The chance to work in a diverse, inclusive, and innovative environment

postedCompany.description:
Who we are

Wise is a global technology company, building the best way to move money around the world. With the Wise account people and businesses can hold over 40 currencies, move money between countries and spend money abroad. Large companies and banks use Wise technology too; an entirely new cross-border payments network that will one day power money without borders for everyone, everywhere. However you use the platform, Wise is on a mission to make your life easier and save you money.

Co-founded by Kristo Käärmann and Taavet Hinrikus, Wise launched in 2011 under its original name TransferWise. It is one of the world’s fastest growing, profitable technology companies and is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker, WISE.

16 million people and businesses use Wise. In fiscal year 2023, Wise processed approximately £105 billion in cross-border transactions, saving customers around £1.5 billion.

What it’s really like to work here

At Wise, we do things a bit differently. There’s no corporate nonsense, and no old-fashioned hierarchy. Instead, we work in dozens of self-sufficient, autonomous teams. Think of them like start-ups within a start-up that learn from each other.

Each team picks the problems they want to solve. So there’s no micro-management. No hiding behind fancy job titles. And no one telling you what to do. You are your own boss. But you’ll get tons of guidance and plenty of support from talented, super-smart colleagues from all over Wise.

We’re going to be upfront — the way we work doesn’t suit everyone. But if freedom, autonomy, and life-affirming, head-scratching professional challenges rock your world, we could be a match made in heaven.
postedCompany.name: WISE ASIA-PACIFIC PTE. LTD.
